headline: KEY PRIVATE BANK NAMED A WINNER FOR 'REGIONAL PRIVATE BANK' AT THE 2026 FAMILY WEALTH REPORT AWARDS
summary: Key Private Bank, the high-net worth and ultra-high-net-worth wealth management segment of KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY), has been selected as a winner for 'Regional Private Bank' at the Thirteenth Annual Family Wealth Report Awards, marking the third time the firm has received this distinction.
